sources: Ministry of Finance of Ukraine - 2026 Draft Budget Report

income_and_profit_taxes.name: PIT, Military Levy, and Corporate Income Tax

education_and_science.name: Education and R&D (including teacher pay rise)

2026.methodology: The 2026 forecast is based on the Government-approved Budget Declaration and the 2026 Draft Budget. Revenue is projected to reach approx. $64.98 billion USD due to nominal GDP growth and improved tax administration. Total expenditures reach $107.92 billion USD, with a continued focus on defense (approx. $62.64 billion USD). The fiscal gap (deficit) of approx. $42.94 billion USD is planned to be covered by external financing and domestic borrowing. Calculations converted from UAH using an average exchange rate of 44.7 UAH/USD.

sources: Law of Ukraine on the State Budget for 2025
Ministry of Finance of Ukraine Budget Projection
Macroeconomic Forecast by the National Bank of Ukraine

tax_revenues.name: Tax Revenues (VAT, CIT, Personal Income Tax)

2025.methodology: Data derived from the Law of Ukraine No. 4024-IX 'On the State Budget of Ukraine for 2025'. Revenue is calculated at $52.26 billion USD. Spending is prioritized for defense (approx. $49.66 billion USD). The massive fiscal gap between income and spending is planned to be financed through approx. $35.84 billion USD in external borrowing and domestic bonds (OVDP). Calculations converted from UAH using the forecast rate of 44.7 UAH/USD.

sources: Ministry of Finance of Ukraine - Budget Execution Report 2024
Cabinet of Ministers of Ukraine - Official Revenue Data

2024.methodology: The data reflects execution of the State Budget for 2024. Total income converted to $69.80 billion USD. Spending reached $100.45 billion USD, with $66.44 billion USD allocated to Security and Defense. The deficit was covered primarily through international loans and domestic bonds. Calculations converted from UAH using the fixed reference rate of 44.7 UAH/USD.
